description: Global emerald prices are subject to significant volatility based on consumer demand, competing gemstone markets, and economic conditions in key markets (USA, Europe, Middle East).
mitigationPlan: Diversify sales channels; develop direct-to-consumer marketing; maintain strategic stockpile.

description: ZESCO's USD 500M sovereign-guaranteed debt poses systemic risk to Zambia's fiscal position. Continued operating losses increase probability of government bailout.
mitigationPlan: Implement cost-reflective tariffs; restructure debt; reduce technical losses from 22% to 15%.

description: Rising NPL ratio in the SME and agricultural lending portfolio due to economic pressures and drought impact on farming clients.
mitigationPlan: Strengthen credit underwriting; increase loan loss provisions; implement early warning system.

description: ZAMTEL continues to lose market share to MTN Zambia and Airtel Zambia due to inferior network quality and limited 4G/5G coverage.
mitigationPlan: Invest ZMW 1.2B in network modernisation; launch 4G LTE in all provincial capitals by 2025.

description: Zambia Railways' track infrastructure is over 50 years old with significant sections requiring urgent rehabilitation. Derailment risk is elevated.
mitigationPlan: Prioritise rehabilitation of highest-risk sections; implement speed restrictions; seek AfDB financing.

description: El Niño-related drought reduces maize and soya production, increasing animal feed costs and threatening Zambeef's integrated farming operations.
mitigationPlan: Expand irrigation infrastructure; diversify feed sourcing to regional markets; maintain 90-day feed stockpile.

description: IRH/Delta Mining acquisition financing creates significant debt obligations that could strain Mopani's cash flow if copper prices decline.
mitigationPlan: Monitor copper price hedging; maintain minimum cash reserve of ZMW 500M; quarterly debt covenant review.

description: Indeni's operations depend entirely on crude oil supply through the aging TAZAMA pipeline from Dar es Salaam. Pipeline failures cause refinery shutdowns.
mitigationPlan: Advocate for TAZAMA pipeline rehabilitation; develop emergency crude storage capacity; explore alternative supply routes.
